_description: Path mapping for the Anbernic RG40XX V running muOS. Saves are stored PER-CORE by RetroArch (sort_savefiles_enable=true), so system_paths values are core directory names and rom_paths carries the per-system ROM folder names used for ROM-anchored identity. Every entry below is validated against the reference device's real files (CONTINUITY_RECON.txt, 2026-07-09); unproven cores are deliberately absent — the daemon logs unknown save dirs, add pairs as they are observed, never from memory.
_rom_roots_note: Informational. Runtime ROM-anchoring reads $CONTINUITY_ROMS_ROOT from the PAL (/mnt/union/ROMS, muOS's unionfs merge of SD1/SD2, falling back to /mnt/mmc/ROMS), not this field.
